title: BIG|BRAVE Announce New Album in grief or in hope: Hear “the ineptitude for mutual discernment”
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:

The post BIG|BRAVE Announce New Album <em>in grief or in hope</em>: Hear “the ineptitude for mutual discernment” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last year, BIG|BRAVE unleashed OST. Today, the Montreal band is back to announce their tenth studio album in grief or in hope, arriving in June. The lead single "the ineptitude for mutual discernment" is here.

For in grief or in hope, guitarist/vocalist Robin Wattie and guitarist Mathieu Ball were joined in the studio by their longtime touring bassist Liam Andrews (MY DISCO, Aicher). About the record, Wattie says, "I wanted to explore catchy, melodic phrasing weaved throughout the intensity of the instrumentation and drony chord changes. All that I could reflect on was grief and hope; death and life; cause and effect; shared experiences of being a human person."

"the ineptitude for mutual discernment" is a glitchy, hypnotic dirge. Dive in below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "what may be the kindest way to leave"
02 "a shape of shame"
03 "the ineptitude for mutual discernment"
04 "holding tongue"
05 "verdure"
06 "skin ripper"
07 "an uttering of antipathy"
08 "in grief or in hope"

in grief or in hope is out 6/12 via Thrill Jockey. Pre-order it here.
